codeReview.summary: The obs-live-progress-streaming feature fully implements VAL-OBS-006 by adding 6 new DaemonEvent variants for per-turn observability (ToolInvocationStarted/Completed, AgentTurnStarted/Completed, ValidationStepStarted/Completed). The implementation includes emit methods in EventEmitter, CLI display handling with turn numbers and structured metadata, dashboard integration, and 14 comprehensive integration tests.

summary: Feature obs-live-progress-streaming passes review. Implementation adds 6 new DaemonEvent variants with proper serialization, EventEmitter emit methods, CLI event display with turn numbers, dashboard integration, and 14 passing tests. All verification steps pass: cargo test -p swell-cli --test live_progress_streaming (14 tests), cargo clippy -p swell-cli/daemon/core (no warnings). No convention, skill, service, or knowledge gaps identified.
